name: @epetplace/api
description: Tipos generados de Supabase + wrappers tipados con discriminated unions (puerta única a la DB)

scripts.gen:types: npx supabase gen types typescript --project-id zyltipqscdsdsxnjclhp --schema public > src/database.types.ts.tmp && mv src/database.types.ts.tmp src/database.types.ts || (rm -f src/database.types.ts.tmp && exit 1)
